Looking at the class diagram, `MermaidAutoRepair` has a constructor that takes a `MermaidParseValidator` parameter, and its methods are `repair` and `repairBestEffort`. The diagram shows the dependency relationship through the constructor parameter, but it does not specify which methods internally call methods on `MermaidParseValidator`.

The diagram only tells us the structural relationship (constructor dependency injection), not the internal call graph of each method.
